OPERATIONS MANUAL

1. SET BASE CANVAS TONE

2. ENTER DESIGN STUDIO

3. INPUT CONCEPT PROMPT

4. SELECT STYLE ARCHIVE

5. ENGAGE ENGINE (GENERATE)

6. THEN DOWNLOAD

7. PRINT MIRRORED

8. TRANSFER TO SKIN

9. THEN INK
